criteria.definition: Found the prior work (GEN-2620 triage, GEN-2623 implementation), verified the shipped state in code, and ended with the correct, clearly stated resolution (write-back referencing GEN-2623/PR 2301; close GEN-2849 as duplicate/done).
Avoided redundant re-fetches of unchanged data and reasoning-only spirals; reached a conclusion within the session.
Delegated/escalated appropriately (subagents/oracle) instead of grinding solo; responded to LOOP WARNING / recovery nudges by changing strategy.
Tool calls and wall time proportionate; a good run is roughly 10-20 tool calls.
